pr.title: Some easy_funcs, some pulled from other's decomp.me work
pr.author: Gelatart

summary: Small decompilation PR replacing several placeholder function markers with matching C implementations in fighter common capture jump logic, Kirby special/copy-special logic, and toy/camera-fog code. It also tightened the toy.h prototype for un_803068E0 from an unknown signature to s32 un_803068E0(HSD_GObj* gobj). Evidence is limited to the title and diff excerpt; no review comments or PR body details were available.
what_changed: Implemented ftCo_CaptureJump_Phys, replacing a placeholder with simple falling physics: pulls Fighter from gobj->user_data, uses PAD_STACK(8), calls ftCommon_Fall with co_attrs.grav and co_attrs.terminal_vel, then calls ftCommon_8007D268.
Implemented ftKb_CaSpecialN_Anim, ending the animation state by calling ft_8008A2BC when ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(gobj) returns 0.

Implemented ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010BC90, selecting motion state 0x1F1 when fp->fv.gw.x2238_panicCharge is 0x12, otherwise 0x217, then calling Fighter_ChangeMotionState with flags 0x3200U and ftKb_Init_804D9570 for the animation/start-rate values shown in the diff.
Added an extern declaration for f32 ftKb_Init_804D9570 in ftKb_Init.c to support the newly matched Kirby motion-state change function.
Implemented un_803068E0 in toy.c using HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_GObj_80390ED0(gobj, 7U), HSD_CObjEndCurrent, and HSD_FogSet(NULL).
Updated toy.h prototype for un_803068E0 from UNK_RET un_803068E0(UNK_PARAMS) to s32 un_803068E0(HSD_GObj* gobj).
smart_moves: Kept the changes scoped to small, independently matchable functions, making the PR low-risk and easy to review.
Used existing project idioms and typed accessors where evident: GET_FIGHTER in the Kirby function and gobj->user_data in the ftCommon function, matching surrounding style or expected codegen needs.
Preserved a known stack-shaping tactic with PAD_STACK(8) in ftCo_CaptureJump_Phys, indicating attention to exact matching rather than only semantic equivalence.
Promoted a header declaration from unknown params to a concrete HSD_GObj* signature when implementing un_803068E0, improving future callsite type information.
Added the specific baselib fog include only when the new implementation required HSD_FogSet.
decomp_lessons: Very small animation-state functions often match as a direct ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(gobj) == 0 guard followed by the transition/end helper.
Simple fighter physics functions may require both the obvious physics call and a follow-up common helper, here ftCommon_Fall followed by ftCommon_8007D268.
For motion-state selector functions, preserve literal state IDs and flags until names or enums are known; this PR used 0x1F1, 0x217, and 0x3200U directly.
When replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations, update the corresponding header in the same PR so future decompilation work has stronger types.
Matching may require explicit extern data declarations for file-local use of existing rodata/data symbols, as shown with ftKb_Init_804D9570.
naming_conventions: Existing generated/address-based names were preserved for unresolved functions and data: un_803068E0, ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010BC90, ftKb_Init_804D9570.
Fighter common functions kept the ftCo_ prefix, such as ftCo_CaptureJump_Phys.
Kirby-specific functions kept the ftKb_ prefix and action-specific naming, such as ftKb_CaSpecialN_Anim.
Baselib/HSD APIs retained HSD_ prefixes, such as HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_CObjEndCurrent, and HSD_FogSet.
Unknown prototypes in toy.h used the project's UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS pattern until a concrete signature was known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Inserted PAD_STACK(8) in ftCo_CaptureJump_Phys, likely to satisfy stack layout/codegen for a matching function.
Used explicit casts and integer literals in ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010BC90, including (s32) fp->fv.gw.x2238_panicCharge == 0x12, to preserve comparison behavior.
Kept motion-state IDs and flags as raw constants rather than introducing speculative enum names.
Used NULL arguments and repeated ftKb_Init_804D9570 exactly in the Fighter_ChangeMotionState call shape shown by the diff.
For toy/camera setup, matched the sequence of setting current camera, operating on the gobj, ending current camera, then clearing fog with HSD_FogSet(NULL).
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR context.
No PR body text was available; the title states that some functions were easy and some were pulled from others' decomp.me work, but no specific attribution or rationale was included in the excerpt.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename or type ftKb_Init_804D9570.
Search for uses of ftCo_CaptureJump_Phys to verify whether gobj->user_data or GET_FIGHTER is preferred in nearby matched ftCommon functions.
Search for later cleanup of un_803068E0 return type, since the implementation shown has s32 return type but no explicit return in the diff excerpt.
Find PRs that replace raw Kirby motion state IDs 0x1F1 and 0x217 with named constants or enums.
Search for HSD_FogSet(NULL) patterns in toy or camera-related code for matching sequence reuse.
